changelog:
## What's new in v0.8.0

### Autonomous mission
- Periodic heartbeat tasks for long-running goals; state in autonomous_mission.yaml and REST API (GET/PUT state, pause/resume, event log with optional limit/since).
- Mission tab in the desktop app.

### Project knowledge graphs
- Register multiple project roots; SQLite-backed index, workspace_graph_search tool, HTML/Markdown reports under workspace_graph/out/<id>/.
- Settings → Data → Project graph.

### Agent profile
- Formality (formal / informal / default) for tone and address.

### Reliability
- Stronger tools-first routing when enabled; cleaner user-facing summaries; improved akasha doctor for packaged installs.

### Optional CLIs
- Prompts may reference AXI-style CLIs (e.g. gh-axi) when installed — optional.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.7.0...v0.8.0
